title: Zovark — Investigation Pipeline
description: Ticket 7 — pipeline latency percentiles, verdict/path distribution (import or recreate panels in SigNoz UI from queries below).

panels.title: Stage span p95 latency (24h)
panels.query: SELECT name, quantile(0.95)(durationNano) / 1e9 AS p95_s, count() AS n FROM signoz_index_v2 WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND (name LIKE 'stage.%' OR name = 'investigation.pipeline') GROUP BY name ORDER BY p95_s DESC

panels.title: Investigation.pipeline count (24h)
panels.query: SELECT count() FROM signoz_index_v2 WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND name = 'investigation.pipeline'

panels.title: Verdict distribution (from stage.store attributes)
panels.query: SELECT tagMap['verdict'] AS verdict, count() AS c FROM signoz_index_v2 WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND name = 'stage.store' GROUP BY verdict ORDER BY c DESC

panels.title: Path / execution_mode (tagMap)
panels.query: SELECT tagMap['plan_path'] AS path, count() AS c FROM signoz_index_v2 WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND name = 'stage.analyze' GROUP BY path ORDER BY c DESC LIMIT 20
